zh.Clontarf, Dublin, Ireland: 愛爾蘭庫迪 度布林可隆塔福
zh.lifeSummary: 當Findláech Mac Ruaidri, Thane of Angus於0975年出生在英國蘇格蘭莫雷時，他的父親Ruairaidh mac Domnall Mormaer of Moray35歲，母親Edith de Ossory34歲。他於1004年與Donada Canmore of Dunkeld在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1020年在愛爾蘭庫迪 度布林可隆塔福享年45歲。

zh-hans.Clontarf, Dublin, Ireland: 爱尔兰庫迪 度布林可隆塔福
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Findláech Mac Ruaidri, Thane of Angus于0975年出生在英国苏格兰莫雷时，他的父亲Ruairaidh mac Domnall Mormaer of Moray35岁，母亲Edith de Ossory34岁。他于1004年与Donada Canmore of Dunkeld在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1020年在爱尔兰庫迪 度布林可隆塔福享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Thane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Fritz, Klaus.
English and Scottish: variant of   Thain  .

variants.name: Thain
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire) and English (East Anglia): status name from Middle English and Older Scots thein, theyn ‘thane’ (Old English and Old Norse thegn), for a person of high social rank, a noble retainer, a warrior, or a senior government officer. Compare Knight . In Scotland in the later Middle Ages the term was used to denote someone who held land directly from the king. Sometimes also from the Old Norse personal name Thegn, derived from the same word.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
Chinese:
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

nameMeanings.name: Angus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and Irish: habitational name from the county and earldom of Angus in Scotland, or from the Gaelic personal name Aonghus, said to be composed of Celtic aon ‘one’ + gus ‘choice’. This was borne by an early Celtic deity and prominent mythological figure, and a famous 8th-century Pictish king.

variants.name: Kennis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Abbe.
Irish and Manx: shortened form Mac Aenghuis ‘son of Aenghus’ (see Angus ).
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): metronymic from the Yiddish female personal name Kene (of uncertain origin) + the Yiddish possessive suffix -s.

variants.name: Hennessy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Kieran, Declan, Brendan, Dermot, Donal, Fidelma, Fintan, Liam, Mairead, Sean Patrick.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hAonghusa ‘descendant of Aonghus’; see Angus , and compare McGinnis .

variants.name: Anguish
meanings: Scottish and English: from an English mishearing of the Scottish Gaelic personal name Aonghus, see Angus and McAninch .

nameMeanings.name: Mac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Mark  , now also quite popular in the English-speaking world. It was given some currency in England in the 1960s by the pop singer  Marc Bolan  (  1947–77 ).

variants.name: Mark
meanings: From the Latin name Marcus , borne by the Evangelist, author of the second gospel in the New Testament, and by several other early and medieval saints. In Arthurian legend, King Mark is the aged ruler of Cornwall to whom Isolde is brought as a bride by Tristan; his name was presumably of Celtic origin, perhaps derived from the element march ‘horse’. This was not a particularly common name in the Middle Ages but was in more frequent use by the end of the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Ruaidri,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name from ruadh ‘red’ + rí ‘king’.

variants.name: Rory
meanings: Anglicized form of the Gaelic name found in Ireland as Ruaidhrí and in Scotland as Ruairidh (see respective appendices). In Scotland this is further Anglicized to Roderick . In recent times, Rory has come into popular general use.

variants.name: Ruarí
meanings: Traditional name from ruadh ‘red’ + rí ‘king’.

en.lifeSummary: When Findláech Mac Ruaidri, Thane of Angus was born in 0975, in Moray, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Ruairaidh mac Domnall Mormaer of Moray, was 35 and his mother, Edith de Ossory, was 34. He married Donada Canmore of Dunkeld in 1004, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1020, in Clontarf, County Dublin, Ireland, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Findláech Mac Ruaidri, Thane of Angus est né en 0975, à Moray, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ruairaidh mac Domnall Mormaer of Moray, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Edith de Ossory, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Donada Canmore of Dunkeld en 1004, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1020, à Clontarf, County Dublin, Irlande, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Findláech Mac Ruaidri, Thane of Angus 0975 in Moray, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ruairaidh mac Domnall Mormaer of Moray 35 und seine Mutter Edith de Ossory 34. Er hat 1004 in Schottland, United Kingdom Donada Canmore of Dunkeld geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1020 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Clontarf, County Dublin, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Findláech Mac Ruaidri, Thane of Angus è nato il nel 0975 nel Moray, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Ruairaidh mac Domnall Mormaer of Moray, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Edith de Ossory, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Donada Canmore of Dunkeld nel 1004, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1020, nel Clontarf, County Dublin, Irlanda, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Findláech Mac Ruaidri, Thane of Angusが0975年にイギリススコットランドモーアイで生まれた時，父Ruairaidh mac Domnall Mormaer of Morayは35歳，母Edith de Ossoryは34歳であった。1004年にイギリススコットランドでDonada Canmore of Dunkeldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1020年にアイルランドコウントイ ダブリンクロンターフで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Findláech Mac Ruaidri, Thane of Angus(이)가 0975년 영국 스코틀랜드 모라이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ruairaidh mac Domnall Mormaer of Moray(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Edith de Ossory(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1004년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Donada Canmore of Dunkeld(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1020년 아일랜드 카운티 드블린 클론타르프에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Findláech Mac Ruaidri, Thane of Angus nasceu em 0975, em Moray, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ruairaidh mac Domnall Mormaer of Moray, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Edith de Ossory, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Donada Canmore of Dunkeld em 1004, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1020, em Clontarf, County Dublin, Irlanda, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Findláech Mac Ruaidri, Thane of Angus родился в 0975 г. в местности мореи, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ruairaidh mac Domnall Mormaer of Moray было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Edith de Ossory, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Donada Canmore of Dunkeld в 1004 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1020 г. в местности клонтарф, коунти дублинь, Ирландия в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Findláech Mac Ruaidri, Thane of Angus nació en 0975, en Moray, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Ruairaidh mac Domnall Mormaer of Moray, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Edith de Ossory, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Donada Canmore of Dunkeld en 1004, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1020, en Clontarf, County Dublin, Irlanda, a la edad de 45 años.
